GAM_Evaluation

2025-12-15

#Plotting ROC and reporting AUC for train data with the different model, also showing the performance of the different models on the test data set
library(pROC)
## Type 'citation("pROC")' for a citation.
## 
## Attaching package: 'pROC'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     cov, smooth, var
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(mgcv)
## Loading required package: nlme
## 
## Attaching package: 'nlme'
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     collapse
## This is mgcv 1.9-3. For overview type 'help("mgcv-package")'.
library(PCAmixdata)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
#saveRDS(bam_model, file = "gam_model.rds")

#saveRDS(bam_model, file = "bam_model_shrink_weight_b.rds")

#write.csv(df_1, "df_1.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(df_1_b, "df_1_b.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(df_2_b, "df_2_b.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(df_2, "df_2.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(df_3, "df_3.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(df_3_b, "df_3_b.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(df_a_b, "df_a_b.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(df_a, "df_a.csv", row.names = FALSE)

df_1<- c("df_1.csv")
dfa <- lapply(df_1, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df_1 <- do.call(rbind, dfa)

df_2<- c("df_2.csv")
dfb <- lapply(df_2, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df_2 <- do.call(rbind, dfb)

df_3<- c("df_3.csv")
dfc <- lapply(df_3, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df_3 <- do.call(rbind, dfc)

df_a<- c("df_a.csv")
dfd <- lapply(df_a, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df_a <- do.call(rbind, dfd)

df_1_b<- c("df_1_b.csv")
dfa <- lapply(df_1_b, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df_1_b <- do.call(rbind, dfa)

df_2_b<- c("df_2_b.csv")
dfb <- lapply(df_2_b, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df_2_b <- do.call(rbind, dfb)

df_3_b<- c("df_3_b.csv")
dfc <- lapply(df_3_b, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df_3_b <- do.call(rbind, dfc)

df_a_b<- c("df_a_b.csv")
dfd <- lapply(df_a_b, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df_a_b <- do.call(rbind, dfd)
gam_model <- readRDS("gam_model.rds")
gam_model_b <- readRDS("gam_model_b.rds")
bam_model <- readRDS("bam_model.rds")
bam_model_b <- readRDS("bam_model_b.rds")
bam_model_shrink <- readRDS("bam_model_shrink.rds")
bam_model_shrink_b <- readRDS("bam_model_shrink_b.rds")
bam_model_shrink_weight <- readRDS("bam_model_shrink_weight.rds")
bam_model_shrink_weight_b <- readRDS("bam_model_shrink_weight_b.rds")
df_1_b$predicted_prob <- predict(gam_model_b, type = "response")
df_2$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model, type = "response")
#TRAIN

#Linear SVI
actual <- df_1$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_1$predicted_prob
roc_test_1 <- roc(
  response  = df_1$Diabetes_binary,
  predictor = df_1$predicted_prob,
  direction = "<"
)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
# AUC value
auc_test_1 <- auc(roc_test_1)

cat("Test AUC:", round(auc_test_1, 5), "\n")
## Test AUC: 0.49941
#Linear S.E. separate
actual <- df_1_b$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_1_b$predicted_prob
roc_test_1_b <- roc(
  response  = df_1_b$Diabetes_binary,
  predictor = df_1_b$predicted_prob,
  direction = "<"
)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
# AUC value
auc_test_1_b <- auc(roc_test_1_b)

cat("Test AUC:", round(auc_test_1_b, 5), "\n")
## Test AUC: 0.49979
#Interactions SVI
actual <- df_2$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_2$predicted_prob
roc_test_2 <- roc(
  response  = df_2$Diabetes_binary,
  predictor = df_2$predicted_prob,
  direction = "<"
)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
# AUC value
auc_test_2 <- auc(roc_test_2)

cat("Test AUC:", round(auc_test_2, 5), "\n")
## Test AUC: 0.49979
#Interactions S.E. separate
actual <- df_2_b$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_2_b$predicted_prob
roc_test_2_b <- roc(
  response  = df_2_b$Diabetes_binary,
  predictor = df_2_b$predicted_prob,
  direction = "<"
)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
# AUC value
auc_test_2_b <- auc(roc_test_2_b)

cat("Test AUC:", round(auc_test_2_b, 5), "\n")
## Test AUC: 0.81891
#Interactions and Shrinkage SVI
actual <- df_3$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_3$predicted_prob
roc_test_3 <- roc(
  response  = df_3$Diabetes_binary,
  predictor = df_3$predicted_prob,
  direction = "<"
)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
# AUC value
auc_test_3 <- auc(roc_test_3)

cat("Test AUC:", round(auc_test_3, 5), "\n")
## Test AUC: 0.81756
#Interactions S.E. separate
actual <- df_3_b$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_3_b$predicted_prob

## Test AUC: 0.82002
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(grid)  # for unit()

#Combine ROC data into a single data frame for training set
make_roc_df <- function(roc_obj, model, variant) {
  data.frame(
    FPR = 1 - roc_obj$specificities,
    TPR = roc_obj$sensitivities,
    Model = model,
    Variant = variant
  )
}

roc_df_train <- rbind(
  make_roc_df(roc_test_1,   "Linear", "SVI"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_1_b, "Linear", "S.E. sep"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_2,   "Interactions", "SVI"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_2_b, "Interactions", "S.E. sep"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_3,   "Int + Shrinkage", "SVI"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_3_b, "Int + Shrinkage", "S.E. sep"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_a,   "Int + Shrink + Weights", "SVI"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_a_b, "Int + Shrink + Weights", "S.E. sep")
) %>%
  mutate(Facet = paste(Model, Variant, sep = " - "))

#Set the facet order exactly
facet_levels <- c(
  "Linear - SVI", "Linear - S.E. sep",
  "Interactions - SVI", "Interactions - S.E. sep",
  "Int + Shrinkage - SVI", "Int + Shrinkage - S.E. sep",
  "Int + Shrink + Weights - SVI", "Int + Shrink + Weights - S.E. sep"
)
roc_df_train$Facet <- factor(roc_df_train$Facet, levels = facet_levels)

#Create AUC labels for each facet (bottom-right)
auc_labels_train <- data.frame(
  Facet = facet_levels,
  AUC = c(auc_test_1, auc_test_1_b,
          auc_test_2, auc_test_2_b,
          auc_test_3, auc_test_3_b,
          auc_test_a, auc_test_a_b),
  x = 0.95,
  y = 0.05
)

#Plot training ROC curves
p_train <- ggplot(roc_df_train, aes(x = FPR, y = TPR, linetype = Variant)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1F77B4", size = 1.2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0,
              linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray", size = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~Facet, ncol = 4, scales = "free") +
  geom_text(data = auc_labels_train,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste0("AUC=", format(round(AUC, 5), nsmall=5))),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            hjust = 1,
            vjust = 0,
            size = 3) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("SVI" = "solid", "S.E. sep" = "dashed")) +
  labs(
    title = "ROC Curves (Training Set)",
    x = "False Positive Rate",
    y = "True Positive Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 7),       # smaller facet titles
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    panel.spacing = unit(2, "lines")
  )
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
options(repr.plot.width = 20, repr.plot.height = 8)
p_train

# Or save to file
ggsave("ROC_train_set.png", p_train, width = 20, height = 8, dpi = 300)
library(pROC)
#write.csv(test_Diabetes_df, "test_Diabetes_df.csv", row.names = FALSE)
test_Diabetes_df<- c("test_Diabetes_df.csv")
dfs <- lapply(test_Diabetes_df, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
test_Diabetes_df <- do.call(rbind, dfs)
# ======================
# TEST
# ======================
df_4 <- test_Diabetes_df
df_4$predicted_prob <- predict(gam_model, newdata = df_4, type = "response")

df_4_b <- test_Diabetes_df
df_4_b$predicted_prob <- predict(gam_model_b, newdata = df_4_b, type = "response")

df_6 <- test_Diabetes_df

df_6_b <- test_Diabetes_df

df_7 <- test_Diabetes_df
df_7$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model_shrink_weight, newdata = df_7, type = "response")

df_7_b <- test_Diabetes_df
df_7_b$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model_shrink_weight_b, newdata = df_7_b, type = "response")

# Linear SVI

  response  = df_4$Diabetes_binary,
  predictor = df_4$predicted_prob,
  direction = "<"
)

make_roc_df <- function(roc_obj, model, variant) {
  data.frame(
    FPR = 1 - roc_obj$specificities,
    TPR = roc_obj$sensitivities,
    Model = model,
    Variant = variant
  )
}

roc_df_test <- rbind(
  make_roc_df(roc_test_4,   "Linear", "SVI"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_4_b, "Linear", "S.E. sep"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_5,   "Interactions", "SVI"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_5_b, "Interactions", "S.E. sep"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_6,   "Int + Shrinkage", "SVI"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_6_b, "Int + Shrinkage", "S.E. sep"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_7,   "Int + Shrink + Weights", "SVI"),
  make_roc_df(roc_test_7_b, "Int + Shrink + Weights", "S.E. sep")
)

library(ggplot2)

# Pre-compute AUC labels for annotation
auc_labels <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Linear", "Linear", "Interactions", "Interactions",
            "Int + Shrinkage", "Int + Shrinkage",
            "Int + Shrink + Weights", "Int + Shrink + Weights"),
  Variant = c("SVI", "S.E. sep", "SVI", "S.E. sep",
              "SVI", "S.E. sep", "SVI", "S.E. sep"),
  AUC = c(auc_test_4, auc_test_4_b,
          auc_test_5, auc_test_5_b,
          auc_test_6, auc_test_6_b,
          auc_test_7, auc_test_7_b),
  # Set positions for labels (adjust as needed)
  FPR = 0.65,
  TPR = seq(0.25, 0.9, length.out = 8)
)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(grid)  # for unit()

roc_df_facets <- roc_df_test %>%
  mutate(Facet = paste(Model, Variant, sep = " - "))

facet_levels <- c(
  "Linear - SVI", "Linear - S.E. sep",
  "Interactions - SVI", "Interactions - S.E. sep",
  "Int + Shrinkage - SVI", "Int + Shrinkage - S.E. sep",
  "Int + Shrink + Weights - SVI", "Int + Shrink + Weights - S.E. sep"
)
roc_df_facets$Facet <- factor(roc_df_facets$Facet, levels = facet_levels)

# AUC labels at bottom-right of each facet
auc_labels <- data.frame(
  Facet = facet_levels,
  AUC = c(auc_test_4, auc_test_4_b,
          auc_test_5, auc_test_5_b,
          auc_test_6, auc_test_6_b,
          auc_test_7, auc_test_7_b),
  x = 0.95,
  y = 0.05
)

# Plot
p <- ggplot(roc_df_facets, aes(x = FPR, y = TPR, linetype = Variant)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1F77B4", size = 1.2) +  
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0,
              linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray", size = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~Facet, ncol = 4, scales = "free") +
  geom_text(data = auc_labels,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = paste0("AUC=", format(round(AUC, 5), nsmall=5))),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            hjust = 1,
            vjust = 0,
            size = 3) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("SVI" = "solid", "S.E. sep" = "dashed")) +
  labs(
    title = "ROC Curves (Test Set)",
    x = "False Positive Rate",
    y = "True Positive Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 7),       # smaller facet titles
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16), # bigger title
    panel.spacing = unit(2, "lines")           # more spacing between facets
  )

# If in a notebook, increase plot size:
options(repr.plot.width = 25, repr.plot.height = 8)
p

# Or to save as a large figure:
ggsave("ROC_test_set.png", p, width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 300)
get_classification_metrics <- function(actual, predicted_prob, threshold = 0.5) {
  #probabilities to class labels based on threshold
  predicted_class <- ifelse(predicted_prob >= threshold, 1, 0)
  
  #confusion matrix
  conf_mat <- table(Predicted = predicted_class, Actual = actual)
  
  #check cells are there
  TP <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["1","1"]), conf_mat["1","1"], 0)
  TN <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["0","0"]), conf_mat["0","0"], 0)
  FP <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["1","0"]), conf_mat["1","0"], 0)
  FN <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["0","1"]), conf_mat["0","1"], 0)
  
  #readout of metrics
  sensitivity <- TP / (TP + FN)        # True Positive Rate
  specificity <- TN / (TN + FP)        # True Negative Rate
  FPR <- FP / (FP + TN)                # False Positive Rate
  FNR <- FN / (FN + TP)                # False Negative Rate
  accuracy <- (TP + TN) / (TP + TN + FP + FN)
  
  metrics <- list(
    confusion_matrix = conf_mat,
    TP = TP, FP = FP, TN = TN, FN = FN,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    FPR = FPR,
    FNR = FNR,
    accuracy = accuracy
  )
  
  return(metrics)
}
df_4 <- test_Diabetes_df
df_4$predicted_prob <- predict(gam_model, newdata = df_4, type = "response")
actual <- df_4$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_4$predicted_prob

# Get metrics using 0.5 threshold
metrics_0.5 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.5)
print(metrics_0.5)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted     0     1
##         0 43006  6144
##         1   663   923
## 
## $TP
## [1] 923
## 
## $FP
## [1] 663
## 
## $TN
## [1] 43006
## 
## $FN
## [1] 6144
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.130607
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.9848176
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.01518239
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.869393
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.8658349
# Get metrics using 0.3 threshold (for underrepresented diabetics)
metrics_0.3 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.3)
print(metrics_0.3)

df_4 <- test_Diabetes_df
df_4$predicted_prob <- predict(gam_model_b, newdata = df_4, type = "response")
actual <- df_4$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_4$predicted_prob

# Get metrics using 0.5 threshold
metrics_0.5 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.5)
print(metrics_0.5)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted     0     1
##         0 43006  6144
##         1   663   923
## 
## $TP
## [1] 923
## 
## $FP

## 
## $TN
## [1] 43006

## $FN
## [1] 6144

## $accuracy

# Get metrics using 0.3 threshold (for underrepresented diabetics)
metrics_0.3 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.3)
print(metrics_0.3)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted     0     1
##         0 39224  3870
##         1  4445  3197
## 
## $TP
## [1] 3197
## 
## $FP
## [1] 4445
## 
## $TN
## [1] 39224
## 
## $FN
## [1] 3870
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.4523843
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.8982115
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.1017885
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.5476157
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.8361124
df_5 <- test_Diabetes_df
df_5$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model, newdata = df_5, type = "response")
actual <- df_5$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_5$predicted_prob

# Get metrics using 0.5 threshold
metrics_0.5 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.5)
print(metrics_0.5)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted     0     1
##         0 43006  6144
##         1   663   923
## 
## $TP
## [1] 923
## 
## $FP
## [1] 663
## 
## $TN
## [1] 43006
## 
## $FN
## [1] 6144
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.130607
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.9848176
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.01518239
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.869393
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.8658349
# Get metrics using 0.3 threshold (for underrepresented diabetics)
metrics_0.3 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.3)
print(metrics_0.3)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted     0     1
##         0 39224  3870
##         1  4445  3197
## 
## $TP
## [1] 3197
## 
## $FP
## [1] 4445
## 
## $TN
## [1] 39224
## 
## $FN
## [1] 3870
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.4523843
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.8982115
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.1017885
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.5476157
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.8361124
roc_test <- roc(
  response  = df_5$Diabetes_binary,
  predictor = df_5$predicted_prob,
  direction = "<"
)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
# AUC value
auc_test <- auc(roc_test)

cat("Test AUC:", round(auc_test, 5), "\n")
## Test AUC: 0.81917
df_5_b <- test_Diabetes_df
df_5_b$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model_b, newdata = df_5, type = "response")
actual <- df_5_b$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_5_b$predicted_prob

# Get metrics using 0.5 threshold

print(metrics_0.5)
